commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds the `ws` pre-handshake close message to the shared benign uncaught-exception classifier and tests direct plus wrapped error forms.

PR surface: Source +11, Tests +8. Total +19 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main does not match the exact `ws` message, while `ws` 8.21.0 emits that message before handshake completion. I did not run a live Feishu gateway crash-loop reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed; no actionable patch defect was found, and the automerge path should rely on exact-head CI plus maintainer gates.

target.title: fix: classify ws pre-handshake close as benign
target.body:
## Summary
- Classifies the exact `ws` pre-handshake close error as a benign uncaught network exception.
- Keeps the fix centralized in `src/infra/unhandled-rejections.ts` so both gateway and CLI global handlers use the same classifier.
- Adds regression coverage for direct and wrapped/cause forms of the error.

Fixes #88257

## Verification
- `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/unhandled-rejections.test.ts -t 'treats raw pre-connect network uncaught exceptions as benign'`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/unhandled-rejections.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/infra/unhandled-rejections.ts src/infra/unhandled-rejections.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/infra/unhandled-rejections.ts src/infra/unhandled-rejections.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed --base upstream/main` partially completed: conflict markers, changelog attributions, wildcard re-export guards, duplicate coverage, dependency pin guard, package patch guard, core typecheck, core test typecheck all passed; broad core lint was still running and was killed by my 600s local timeout after many clean shards. Narrow file lint passed separately.
- Independent review gate: passed; no security concerns or logic errors found.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: `isBenignUncaughtExceptionError(new Error("WebSocket was closed before the connection was established"))` now returns true, so global uncaught-exception handlers take the existing non-fatal path instead of exiting.

Real environment tested: local macOS source checkout, Node v22.22.2, current `upstream/main` base.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/unhandled-rejections.test.ts`.

Evidence after fix: copied live terminal output from the local OpenClaw source checkout using the patched runtime classifier:

```text
$ node --import tsx --input-type=module
openclaw-real-proof: direct ws close benign = true
openclaw-real-proof: wrapped ws close benign = true
```

Supplemental unit proof: `src/infra/unhandled-rejections.test.ts` passed 65/65 tests; the focused benign-classifier test also passed.

Observed result after fix: direct and wrapped/cause versions of the `ws` pre-handshake close message are classified as benign.

What was not tested: I did not run a live Feishu gateway reconnect/crash-loop reproduction.
target.author: akrimm702

commands.reason: matching ClawSweeper response comment already exists

commands.author: Takhoffman
